name: @cloudflare/containers
description: Helper class for container-enabled Durable Objects

scripts.typecheck:examples: set -e; for dir in examples/*/; do if [ ! -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ]; then continue; fi; echo "==> typecheck $dir"; if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then (cd "$dir" && npm install && npm run typecheck); else tsc --noEmit -p "$dir"; fi; done
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:examples
scripts.test: set -e; for dir in examples/*/; do if [ -d "$dir/test" ] && [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then echo "==> test $dir"; (cd "$dir" && npm install && npm run test); fi; done
